03 = Has severe difficulty hearing and understanding simple greetings and short comments. Requires multiple repetitions, restatements, demonstrations, additional time.

M0410_SPEECH (M0410) Speech Speech and oral (verbal) expression of language in patient's own language. 00 = Expresses complex ideas, feelings, and needs clearly,
